Package com.example.glitch.model

Class EntryRequest

java.lang.Object
com.example.glitch.model.EntryRequest
public class EntryRequest extends Object
Represents one active or exited entry request shown on the guard dashboard. Pattern: Plain Old Java Object used by repository and UI layers. Known issue: iconType currently maps to local drawables and is not remotely configurable.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    EntryRequest(String id, String fullName, String roleTag, String hostName, String gateLabel, String guestIdNumber, com.google.firebase.Timestamp enteredAt, String status, com.google.firebase.Timestamp expiresAt, String iconType)
    Creates an immutable entry request model.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static EntryRequest
    fromMap(String id, Map<String,Object> map)
    Converts Firestore map data into a strongly typed entry request.
    com.google.firebase.Timestamp
    getEnteredAt()
    Returns entry timestamp.
    com.google.firebase.Timestamp
    getExpiresAt()
    Returns pass/request expiry timestamp when available.
    String
    getFullName()
    Returns display name of the requester.
    String
    getGateLabel()
    Returns gate label assigned to this request.
    String
    getGuestIdNumber()
    Returns guest identifier value used by pass/entry lookup.
    String
    getHostName()
    Returns host detail shown under role chip.
    String
    getIconType()
    Returns icon type key used for local UI icon mapping.
    String
    getId()
    Returns Firestore document id.
    String
    getRoleTag()
    Returns short role label (for example Guest, Service, Contractor).
    String
    getStatus()
    Returns current request status.
